html:
Exclusive to:

For detailed farming informations, see Farm Plant.

The Pepper Plant is an object exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in the Reap What You Sow update. It can be obtained by planting Lumpy Seeds (also named Pepper Seeds, if researched with the Gardeneer Hat) into Farm Soil or on the ground as Wormwood. There is a chance to grow a Pepper Plant by planting regular Seeds.

The plant's favourite seasons are Autumn and Summer, so in Spring and Winter it will grow slower and accumulate more Stress points.

When harvesting in the full stage, it will give 1 Pepper and 0-2 Lumpy/Pepper Seeds depending on the amount of stress points the plant accumulated. It can also grow into a Giant Pepper, if the plant accumulated only 0-1 stress points. When picked and hammered, it will drop 2-3 Peppers and 2-3 Lumpy/Pepper Seeds.

The Pepper stays 4 days on the plant before rotting and the Giant Pepper stays 6 Days on the plant. If it has been planted by Wormwood, it lasts 50% longer before spoiling. Picking the plant in its rotten stage will give 1 Rot (normal) or 3 Rot and 1 Pepper Seed (giant). After 4 to 5 days of being in the rotten stage, a non-giant Pepper Plant grows back, but the new plant cannot become giant.

When picking up a rotten plant, a Fruit Fly has a 5% chance to spawn.

Gallery

  • Pepper Plant in Plant Registry.
DSTDSRoGSWHam

{{for|detailed farming informations|Farm Plant}}
The '''Pepper Plant''' is an object exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in the ''[[Reap What You Sow]]'' update. It can be obtained by planting [[Crop Seeds/DST#Lumpy Seeds|Lumpy Seeds]] (also named Pepper Seeds, if researched with the [[Gardeneer Hat]]) into [[Farm Soil]] or on the ground as [[Wormwood]]. There is a chance to grow a Pepper Plant by planting regular [[Seeds]].

The plant's favourite seasons are [[Autumn]] and [[Summer]], so in [[Spring]] and [[Winter]] it will grow slower and accumulate more [[Farm Plant#Stress|Stress]] points.

When harvesting in the full stage, it will give 1 [[Pepper]] and 0-2 Lumpy/Pepper Seeds depending on the amount of stress points the plant accumulated. It can also grow into a [[Giant Crops#Giant Pepper|Giant Pepper]], if the plant accumulated only 0-1 stress points. When picked and [[hammer]]ed, it will drop 2-3 Peppers and 2-3 Lumpy/Pepper Seeds.

The Pepper stays 4 days on the plant before rotting and the Giant Pepper stays 6 [[Day]]s on the plant. If it has been planted by Wormwood, it lasts 50% longer before spoiling. Picking the plant in its rotten stage will give 1 [[Rot]] (normal) or 3 Rot and 1 Pepper Seed (giant). After 4 to 5 days of being in the rotten stage, a non-giant Pepper Plant grows back, but the new plant cannot become giant.

When picking up a rotten plant, a [[Fruit Fly]] has a 5% chance to spawn.
